scripts.dev:electron: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --external electron --out-dir dist-electron --clean --watch
scripts.desktop: concurrently -k "npm:dev" "npm:dev:electron" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -b && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --external electron --out-dir dist-electron --clean
